description: Wen (WEN) emerged in 2024 as a playful tribute to the “wen moon” meme, gaining massive attention through one of Web3’s widest airdrops and rapid community growth. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031 second block time — ATC-20 WEN gives holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract support, and a faster, safer, more scalable future across Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Wen
